text.title: structured-output Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for structured-output as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using JSON mode instead of structured output for production extraction pipelines.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: JSON mode returns valid JSON syntax but may omit required fields, add unexpected fields, or use wrong types. These are silent failures that corrupt downstream state.

failure-mode.description: Streaming responses with structured output: trying to parse the response incrementally.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Structured output validation requires the complete response. Streaming cannot be validated until the stream completes. Buffer the full response before parsing.

failure-mode.description: Schema complexity compounds with context length: testing schema on short toy examples then deploying on production-length contexts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A schema that works on 100-token inputs may produce validation errors on 8K-token inputs where the model's attention is spread across a much larger context. Always test at production context length.
